typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Chunk identity remains coupled to sourceVersionID in ProjectionPipelineService, so source-version updates rekey unchanged chunks and prevent true unchanged-skip persistence for small edits.
SearchIndexStore.applyChunkDiff still performs delete+insert churn for unchanged-content chunks when IDs are rekeyed, so full chunk-set rewrite behavior remains under source-version changes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit retrieval-eval evidence (or documented deviation) whenever projection/retrieval outputs change; handoff verification should list scripts/test-openburnbar-retrieval-evals.sh when required.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Fix review m3-fix-gap-repair-pagination-and-delete-purge found projection-path changes but handoff commands omitted retrieval eval despite the skill requirement.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce mandatory startup-read evidence for required files (including .factory/library/user-testing.md) before allowing followedProcedure=true in skill feedback.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Fix review m3-fix-true-incremental-chunk-persistence found no user-testing.md read in transcript skeleton while handoff marked followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve the mismatch between unchanged-chunk persistence expectations and source-version-coupled chunk IDs by either revising VAL-INDEX-004/005 contract language or requiring a chunk identity redesign.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Fix review m3-fix-true-incremental-chunk-persistence still fails because architecture couples chunk IDs to sourceVersionID, which conflicts with untouched-ID persistence expectations.
